pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent POM to version 2.3.1.RELEASE to align with Java 11 support and modern Spring features.
Update the Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 11.
Add the Undertow web server starter to replace the default Tomcat server.
Exclude the default Tomcat starter from the web starter to prevent conflict with Undertow.
Add the Spring Boot WebSocket starter to enable WebSocket support.
Add the Java-WebSocket library as a new dependency.
Add the Gson library as a new dependency.
Add the TypeBuilder library as a new dependency.
Add the Spring Boot configuration processor for metadata generation.
Move hardcoded dependency versions to properties for better management.
Add the Aliyun Nexus mirror to the Maven repositories list.
Update project version, description, URL, and license information.

src/main/resources/templates/index.html.general_idea: Add a UI component to display and navigate through a list of video links.
Distinguish video files from regular files in the file list by using a specific icon.
Redirect clicks on playable video files to a dedicated video player endpoint.

src/main/resources/templates/progress.ht.general_idea: Migrate the real-time progress update mechanism from Server-Sent Events (EventSource) to WebSocket for bidirectional communication.
src/main/resources/templates/progress.ht.human_impl: Replaced `new EventSource("progress")` with `new WebSocket("ws://" + window.location.host + "/p")` and updated message handling callbacks.

src/main/resources/templates/progress.ht.general_idea: Introduce user interface controls for auto-scrolling and manual page refreshing.
src/main/resources/templates/progress.ht.human_impl: Added a fixed control bar with a switch for 'auto-scroll' and a button to trigger `refresh()`.

src/main/resources/templates/progress.ht.general_idea: Refactor how incoming progress messages are parsed and displayed in the DOM.
src/main/resources/templates/progress.ht.human_impl:
Replaced simple `innerHTML +=` with a function that splits messages by newline and appends `

` tags to `#message`.

src/main/resources/templates/progress.ht.general_idea: Implement proper lifecycle management for the WebSocket connection including error, close, and cleanup events.
src/main/resources/templates/progress.ht.human_impl: Added `onerror`, `onclose`, and `window.onbeforeunload` handlers to manage connection state and cleanup.

src/main/resources/templates/video.html.general_idea: Include the video.js hotkeys plugin script to enable keyboard shortcuts for playback control.
Update the page title to dynamically include the current video filename using Thymeleaf.
Add a breadcrumb navigation component to display the file path hierarchy.
Change the video container tag from standard HTML5 video to video-js specific tag for better plugin integration.
Add UI buttons for deleting transcoding files, deleting videos, and copying video paths.
Add a switch to toggle MSE (Media Source Extensions) resource usage to fix playback speed issues in some browsers.
Add a table to display a list of files and directories with icons and navigation capabilities.
Initialize video.js with playback rates, hotkeys configuration, and MSE override settings based on user preference.
Implement JavaScript functions to handle AJAX requests for deleting videos and transcoding files.
Implement JavaScript logic to handle navigation when clicking on files or directories in the list.
Implement JavaScript function to copy the current video stream URL to the clipboard.
